headline.description: One-line decision summary the customer sees first.

body.description: 2-4 sentence explanation. For auto_reject, references specific indicators that fired without leaking confidence scores. For human_review, conveys 'one of our specialists will look at this'. For auto_approve, confirms + sets expectation for the warranty process.

next_steps.description: Concrete actions the customer can take now (each as an imperative phrase). Min 1, max 4.

tone.description: Self-classification of tone — operators can filter dashboards by this.
